reasons: Esmeralda is a strong answer to shield-heavy protection plans.
Angela's value drops if the shielded ally cannot safely hold the frontline or dive.

proof.summary: Angela adds shield and sustain to a chosen ally; Esmeralda can pressure shield-based durability and turn extended fights into her own sustain advantage.
worksBestWhen: Esmeralda reaches Angela's attached target instead of chasing Angela herself.
The team times anti-heal or burst around the shielded ally.
failureCases: Angela attaches to a hero Esmeralda cannot reach.
Esmeralda dives too deep and gets controlled before converting shield pressure.

reasons: Baxia reduces the value of Angela's healing-based sustain plan.
His frontline pressure can chase the attached target and force Angela's team to retreat.

proof.summary: Angela wants to extend her ally's survival through healing and shield; Baxia helps reduce sustain value and keeps pressure on the protected target.
worksBestWhen: Baxia marks and chases the attached ally, not a low-value target.
Team damage follows while Angela's sustain is reduced.
failureCases: Baxia cannot reach the Angela-boosted carry.
Angela attaches after Baxia's team has already spent key damage.

reasons: Luo Yi can punish teams that group around an Angela-protected diver.
Her zoning can separate Angela's attached target from follow-up teammates.

proof.summary: Angela increases the value of one engaged ally, while Luo Yi can punish clustered formations and make grouped follow-up more dangerous.
worksBestWhen: Luo Yi targets the follow-up formation, not only the attached hero.
The team uses Luo Yi's zone control around objectives.
failureCases: Angela attaches to a split-pushing or highly mobile hero away from Luo Yi's zone.
Luo Yi misses setup and the Angela target reaches the backline.

reasons: Kaja can punish the carry Angela chooses to attach to.
Locking the boosted hero can waste much of Angela's Heartguard timing.

proof.summary: Angela wants one ally to enter with shield and support; Kaja can hold lockdown for that exact boosted ally and force a failed dive.
worksBestWhen: Kaja saves control for the Heartguard target.
Allies burst during the lockdown before Angela's healing stabilizes the target.
failureCases: Angela's attached ally has defensive backup or immunity timing.

reasons: Saber can punish Angela or her chosen carry before Heartguard value fully resolves.
Heartguard's channel being interruptible creates timing windows before Angela attaches.

proof.summary: Angela's Heartguard needs a channel before attach; burst or interruption before the attach can reduce her save potential.
worksBestWhen: Saber tracks Angela's ultimate cooldown and channel timing.
Saber targets Angela before attach or the protected carry after shield timing weakens.
failureCases: Saber bursts into full shield value without follow-up.
Angela attaches from a safe position and Saber cannot reach her.
